title: Strawberry Cow
description: Adds cute Strawberry Cow to the game! 🍓
body:
# Strawberry Cow **Hi!** This pack adds cute Strawberry Cow to the game! 🍓 You will need [OptiFine](https://www.optifine.net/home), and you will get chance to see pink cows! *10% to be exact!* [Moobloom](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/moobloom) is her best friend, so don't separate them! ❤️🌻🍓💛
**Hope you like it!**
